testcase.name: test_slide_smart_inventory_visible

failure.message:
AssertionError: Slide 'Smart Inventory' not found in page text assert 'Smart Inventory' in '🧾
Digital Invoicing
Create and share GST invoices in seconds.
Get Started
Existing User? Log In' + where '🧾
Digital Invoicing
Create and share GST invoices in seconds.
Get Started
Existing User? Log In' = <tests.e2e.test_01_onboarding.TestOnboardingPage object at 0x000001C0D4F5B750>.body

testcase.failure:
test_01_onboarding.py:68: in test_slide_smart_inventory_visible assert "Smart Inventory" in self.body, ( E AssertionError: Slide 'Smart Inventory' not found in page text E assert 'Smart Inventory' in '🧾
Digital Invoicing
Create and share GST invoices in seconds.
Get Started
Existing User? Log In' E + where '🧾
Digital Invoicing
Create and share GST invoices in seconds.
Get Started
Existing User? Log In' = <tests.e2e.test_01_onboarding.TestOnboardingPage object at 0x000001C0D4F5B750>.body

testcase.name: test_first_dot_is_active

failure.message: AssertionError: First dot is not active assert 'active' in 'dot' + where 'dot' = get_attribute('class') + where get_attribute = <selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="fcc627b795c45af2e378f1e1d1e6b23c", element="f.F5B26AB2B28D1CE6D2DA2637937E4033.d.73162CDA7097E24755096A28A9DA1F4B.e.17")>.get_attribute

testcase.failure: test_01_onboarding.py:121: in test_first_dot_is_active assert "active" in dots[0].get_attribute("class"), ( E AssertionError: First dot is not active E assert 'active' in 'dot' E + where 'dot' = get_attribute('class') E + where get_attribute = <selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="fcc627b795c45af2e378f1e1d1e6b23c", element="f.F5B26AB2B28D1CE6D2DA2637937E4033.d.73162CDA7097E24755096A28A9DA1F4B.e.17")>.get_attribute

failure.message:

Existing User? Log In'

testcase.failure:
test_01_onboarding.py:182: in test_slide_descriptions_present assert "Manage stock alerts" in body, "Slide 1 description missing" E AssertionError: Slide 1 description missing E assert 'Manage stock alerts' in '🧾

testcase.name: test_successful_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected #dashboard after login, got https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login assert '#dashboard' in 'https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login' + where 'https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login' = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="9eacb135bd1543deb7df5c988679180e")>.current_url + where <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="9eacb135bd1543deb7df5c988679180e")> = <tests.e2e.test_02_login.TestLoginPage object at 0x000001C0D4F56C50>.driver

testcase.failure: test_02_login.py:222: in test_successful_login assert "#dashboard" in self.driver.current_url, ( E AssertionError: Expected #dashboard after login, got https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login E assert '#dashboard' in 'https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login' E + where 'https://thegitguy-56.github.io/Smartbiz-frontend/#login' = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="9eacb135bd1543deb7df5c988679180e")>.current_url E + where <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="9eacb135bd1543deb7df5c988679180e")> = <tests.e2e.test_02_login.TestLoginPage object at 0x000001C0D4F56C50>.driver
